# Expense Tracker - React Native Expo App

## Project Overview
Mobile expense tracking application built with React Native and Expo for logging daily expenses and managing monthly recurring bills.

## Tech Stack
- React Native with Expo
- TypeScript
- React Navigation for navigation
- AsyncStorage for local data persistence

## Features Implemented
✅ Daily expense logging with categories
✅ Monthly recurring bills management
✅ Expense summary (daily and monthly totals)
✅ Local data storage (no backend required)
✅ Clean and user-friendly UI in Thai language

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow React Native best practices
- Keep components clean and reusable
- Use async/await for AsyncStorage operations
- Implement proper error handling

## Project Structure
- `/src/navigation` - Navigation setup
- `/src/screens` - All screen components
- `/src/services` - Data management (AsyncStorage)
- `/src/types` - TypeScript type definitions
- `/src/utils` - Constants and utility functions

## How to Run
```bash
npm start       # Start Expo development server
npm run android # Run on Android
npm run ios     # Run on iOS (macOS only)
npm run web     # Run on web browser
```
